glosses.ja: 地下室; ワインセラー

sentences.target: Je vais chercher des pommes à la cave.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vɛ ʃɛʁʃe de pɔm a la kav/

translations.fr: Je vais chercher des pommes à la cave.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vɛ ʃɛʁʃe de pɔm a la kav/
translations.en: I'm going to the cellar to get apples.
translations.es: Voy al sótano a buscar manzanas.
translations.de: Ich gehe in den Keller, um Äpfel zu holen.
translations.it: Vado in cantina a prendere delle mele.
translations.ru: Я иду в подвал за яблоками.
translations.vi: Tôi xuống hầm để lấy táo.
translations.ar: أنا ذاهب إلى القبو لأحضر التفاح.
translations.nl: Ik ga naar de kelder om appels te halen.
translations.uk: Я йду до підвалу за яблуками.
translations.hi: मैं सेब लेने तहखाने में जा रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Πάω στο υπόγειο να πάρω μήλα.
translations.nb: Jeg går ned i kjelleren for å hente epler.
translations.id: Aku turun ke ruang bawah tanah untuk mengambil apel.
translations.sv: Jag går ner i källaren för att hämta äpplen.
translations.ro: Merg la pivniță să iau mere.
translations.da: Jeg går ned i kælderen for at hente æbler.
translations.ja: リンゴを取りに地下室へ行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; clitic subject of the finite verb 'vais'.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; used as a semi-auxiliary selecting the infinitive 'chercher' (near-future construction).
Infinitive verb; complement to 'vais' expressing the action; heads the infinitival clause and takes a direct object.
Indefinite plural article; determiner of 'pommes', marking non-specific plural quantity.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'chercher'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase ('à la cave').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'cave'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'à', indicating location.

sentences.target: La cave est humide après la pluie.

translations.fr: La cave est humide après la pluie.
translations.en: The cellar is damp after the rain.
translations.es: El sótano está húmedo después de la lluvia.
translations.de: Der Keller ist nach dem Regen feucht.
translations.it: La cantina è umida dopo la pioggia.
translations.pt: O porão está úmido depois da chuva.
translations.nl: De kelder is vochtig na de regen.
translations.hi: बारिश के बाद तहखाना नम है।
translations.el: Το υπόγειο είναι υγρό μετά τη βροχή.
translations.id: Ruang bawah tanah lembap setelah hujan.
translations.ja: 雨の後、地下室は湿っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'cave'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, present 3rd person singular; links subject 'cave' to the predicate adjective 'humide'.
Predicate adjective; complements the copula 'est' and describes the subject.
Preposition introducing a temporal prepositional phrase ('après la pluie').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'pluie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'après'.

sentences.target: Tu peux ranger le vin dans la cave.
sentences.reading: /ty pø ʁɑ̃ʒe lə vɛ̃ dɑ̃ la kav/

translations.fr: Tu peux ranger le vin dans la cave.
translations.ipa: /ty pø ʁɑ̃ʒe lə vɛ̃ dɑ̃ la kav/
translations.en: You can store the wine in the cellar.
translations.es: Puedes guardar el vino en la bodega.
translations.de: Du kannst den Wein im Keller lagern.
translations.it: Puoi conservare il vino in cantina.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以把葡萄酒存放在地下室。
translations.yue: 你可以將紅酒放喺酒窖。
translations.ru: Ты можешь хранить вино в подвале.
translations.pt: Você pode guardar o vinho na adega.
translations.he: אתה יכול לאחסן את היין במרתף.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể cất rượu vang trong hầm.
translations.nl: Je kunt de wijn in de kelder bewaren.
translations.uk: Ти можеш зберігати вино в підвалі.
translations.hi: तुम तहखाने में शराब रख सकते हो।
translations.el: Μπορείς να αποθηκεύσεις το κρασί στο κελάρι.
translations.nb: Du kan lagre vin i kjelleren.
translations.id: Kamu bisa menyimpan anggur di ruang bawah tanah.
translations.sv: Du kan förvara vinet i källaren.
translations.da: Du kan opbevare vinen i kælderen.
translations.ja: ワインは地下室に保管できます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'peux'.
Modal verb, present 2nd person singular; selects the infinitive 'ranger' (expresses ability/permission).
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal 'peux'; heads the action and takes a direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'vin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'ranger'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase ('dans la cave').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'cave'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans', indicating location.

sentences.target: On loue une cave pour nos cartons.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ lu yn kav puʁ no kaʁtɔ̃/

translations.fr: On loue une cave pour nos cartons.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ lu yn kav puʁ no kaʁtɔ̃/
translations.en: We rent a storage cellar for our boxes.
translations.es: Alquilamos un trastero para nuestras cajas.
translations.de: Wir mieten einen Keller für unsere Kartons.
translations.it: Affittiamo una cantina per le nostre scatole.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们租了一个地下室来放箱子。
translations.yue: 我哋租咗個地庫嚟擺箱。
translations.ru: Мы арендуем подвал для наших коробок.
translations.pt: Nós alugamos um porão para nossas caixas.
translations.he: אנחנו שוכרים מרתף בשביל הארגזים שלנו.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thuê một hầm để đựng các thùng.
translations.nl: We huren een kelder voor onze dozen.
translations.uk: Ми орендуємо підвал для наших коробок.
translations.hi: हम अपने डिब्बों के लिए एक तहखाना किराए पर लेते हैं।
translations.el: Ενοικιάζουμε ένα υπόγειο για τα κουτιά μας.
translations.nb: Vi leier en kjeller til eskene våre.
translations.id: Kami menyewa ruang bawah tanah untuk kotak-kotak kami.
translations.sv: Vi hyr en källare för våra lådor.
translations.ro: Închiriem o pivniță pentru cutiile noastre.
translations.da: Vi lejer en kælder til vores kasser.
translations.ja: 箱を置くために地下室を借ります。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; grammatically 3rd person singular, often used for 'we/one'.
Finite verb, present 3rd person singular; main predicate of the clause.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'cave'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'loue'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/beneficiary prepositional phrase ('pour nos cartons').
Possessive determiner, 1st person plural; agrees with plural 'cartons' and marks possession.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the preposition 'pour'.
